data.name: 巨乳偶像宅邸
data.detailed_description:
「極限爆乳 × 淫靡經營 × 多重結局」──最晃最暈的娼館經營遊戲，隆重登場！   

歡迎光臨《巨乳偶像宅邸》──這裡沒有禁忌，只有慾望。

在這座為實現夢想而誕生的娼館裡，五位擁有超越人類常理的爆乳女主角正等著你來經營、調教、解放她們的渴望。她們的胸圍...你一看就明白，每一次擺動都是視覺與慾望的衝擊！

玩家將扮演經營者，透過接待形形色色的客人，進行各種淫亂的服務，收集精液作為資源推進故事進度。每位角色都有屬於自己的願望與夢想，而達成這一切的唯一方式──就是成為最淫靡的存在，搾取每一滴精液。

特色內容

．爆乳極限突破：每位女主角的身材都挑戰現實極限，讓視覺衝擊成為你無法抗拒的沉溺。

．自由經營 × 淫亂成長：經營娼館、培育角色、解鎖服裝與新玩法，從制服到偶像、從純愛到墮落，一應俱全。

．豐富HCG × 斷面動畫：全遊戲收錄 54張HCG圖、83個基本構圖、14個角色立繪，包含斷面構造、巨乳物理動畫、各種姿勢與視角，一次滿足你的爆乳性癖！

．多重結局 × 淫亂度養成：角色會隨著玩家選擇走向不同命運──是否墮入無底慾望？還是達成初心夢想？全由你決定。

．通關後彩蛋與特殊模式：達成特定條件可解鎖隱藏劇情與隱藏H場景，玩家絕對不能錯過。

你，準備好成為這座娼館的主宰者了嗎？解放慾望，實現夢想。現在就讓她們的身體──為搾取精液而活。

data.short_description: 滿載爆乳女主角的娼館經營模擬遊戲。搭載動畫H場景與依淫亂度分歧的多重結局。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 9300 or AMD Ryzen™5 5500
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce® GT 760
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Busty Idol Manor
data.detailed_description:
“Extreme Boobs × Lewd Management × Multiple Endings” — the most dizzying, bouncing brothel simulator is here!

Welcome to Busty Idol Manor — where there are no taboos, only desire.

In this dream-driven brothel, five heroines with tits beyond human comprehension await your control, training, and liberation of lust. One glance at their busts says it all — every bounce is a visual and erotic explosion!

You play as the manager, hosting all kinds of clients and performing various obscene services to collect semen — your core resource for progressing the story. Each heroine has her own dreams and desires, and there’s only one way to make them come true — become the ultimate lewd being and squeeze out every last drop of semen.

Key Features:

  • Boob Size to the Max: Each heroine’s body pushes the limits of reality, with visuals so intense they’re impossible to resist.

  • Free Management × Erotic Growth: Run your brothel, train your girls, unlock outfits and kinky play. From uniforms to idols, from pure love to total corruption — everything is on the table.

  • Rich HCG × Internal View Animations: 54 HCGs, 83 base poses, 14 character portraits, featuring internal views, giant boobs with physics, all sorts of positions and angles to satisfy your deepest fetish.

  • Multiple Endings × Lewdness Training: Your choices shape each girl’s fate — will she fall into bottomless lust, or achieve her innocent dream? It’s all up to you.

  • Post-Game Secrets & Special Modes: Unlock hidden stories and hardcore scenes by meeting certain conditions — don’t miss a single climax.

Are you ready to become the master of this brothel? Unleash desire, fulfill dreams. Let their bodies exist for one purpose only — to be milked for semen.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3 9300 or AMD Ryzen™5 5500
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce® GT 760
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
